turns.user_message: My friend said I seemed a bit off today, and now I can't stop thinking about it. I used to just shrug stuff like that off.
That comment keeps replaying in my head, and I'm starting to pick apart everything I said. I feel this tightness in my chest just remembering the conversation.
It's like that one sentence unlocked a floodgate of every doubt I've ever had. I'm completely frozen, convinced I'm messing up every single interaction.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something someone else said or did. This used to not bother the speaker.
